info.title: mloop
info.description: MLoop - A modern CLI tool for ML.NET with filesystem-based MLOps

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new ML project with multi-model support

options.name: --task
options.description: ML task type (e.g., regression, binary-classification, clustering, forecasting, recommendation) [default: binary-classification]

options.name: --name
options.description: Initial model name (default: 'default') [default: default]

options.name: --label
options.description: Label column name (can be set later in mloop.yaml) [default: Label]

options.name: --force
options.description: Reinitialize existing project (preserves .mloop/scripts/ directory) [default: False]

arguments.name: project-name
arguments.description: Name of the project to create (use '.' for current directory)

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name (default: 'default')

options.name: --label
options.description: Name of the label column

options.name: --task
options.description: ML task type (binary-classification, multiclass-classification, regression, anomaly-detection, clustering, ranking, forecasting, time-series-anomaly, recommendation, image-classification, object-detection, text-classification, sentence-similarity, ner, question-answering)

options.name: --time
options.description: Training time limit in seconds

options.name: --metric
options.description: Optimization metric (accuracy, auc, f1, r_squared, etc.)

options.name: --test-split
options.description: Test data split ratio (0.0-1.0)

options.name: --no-promote
options.description: Skip automatic promotion to production [default: False]

options.name: --analyze-data
options.description: Analyze data quality without training (shows preprocessing recommendations) [default: False]

options.name: --generate-script
options.description: Generate preprocessing script from data quality analysis at specified path

options.name: --auto-merge
options.description: Automatically detect and merge CSV files with same schema in datasets/ directory [default: False]

options.name: --drop-missing-labels
options.description: Drop rows with missing label values (default: true for classification, false for regression)

options.name: --data
options.description: Path(s) to training data file(s). Supports external paths and multiple files for auto-merge

options.name: --no-auto-time
options.description: Disable automatic time estimation (use default 300s) [default: False]

options.name: --balance
options.description: Class balancing strategy: 'auto' (balance to 10:1 if ratio > 10:1), 'none' (no balancing), or target ratio (e.g., '5' for 5:1). Use without value for 'auto'.

options.name: --group-column
options.description: Group column for ranking task (groups rows into query contexts)

options.name: --max-rows
options.description: Maximum training rows. Data exceeding this is auto-sampled (random for regression/anomaly, stratified for classification)

options.name: --sampling-strategy
options.description: Sampling strategy when --max-rows is used: 'random' or 'stratified' (default: task-aware)

options.name: --sampling
options.description: Alias for --sampling-strategy

options.name: --seed
options.description: Random seed for sampling reproducibility (default: 42)

arguments.name: data-file
arguments.description: Path to training data (defaults to datasets/train.csv if omitted)

commands.name: predict
commands.description: Make predictions with a trained model

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name (default: 'default')

options.name: --model
options.description: Path to model file (overrides production model)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output path for predictions (defaults to predictions/predictions.csv)

options.name: --unknown-strategy
options.description: Strategy for handling unknown categorical values: auto (default), error, use-most-frequent, use-missing [default: auto]

options.name: --log
options.description: Log predictions to .mloop/logs/ for monitoring and analysis [default: False]

options.name: --include-features
options.description: Include original feature columns in prediction output (default: true) [default: True]

arguments.name: data-file
arguments.description: Path to prediction data (defaults to datasets/predict.csv if omitted)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output path for preprocessed data (defaults to .mloop/temp/preprocess/)

options.name: --label
options.description: Label column name (optional, passes to preprocessing context)

options.name: --incremental
options.description: Use incremental workflow with HITL validation [default: False]

options.name: --skip-hitl
options.description: Skip HITL prompts and use recommended defaults (incremental mode only) [default: False]

options.name: --auto-approve
options.description: Automatically approve rules at confidence checkpoint (incremental mode only) [default: False]

arguments.name: input-file
arguments.description: Path to input data file (defaults to datasets/train.csv if omitted)

options.name: --name
options.description: Filter by model name (shows all models if omitted)

options.name: --all
options.description: Show all experiments including failed ones (default: completed only) [default: False]

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name (default: 'default')

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of entries to show [default: 20]

options.name: --from
options.description: Start date filter (yyyy-MM-dd)

options.name: --to
options.description: End date filter (yyyy-MM-dd)

options.name: --json
options.description: Output in JSON format [default: False]

commands.name: feedback
commands.description: Manage prediction feedback for model monitoring

options.name: --prediction-id
options.description: ID of the prediction to provide feedback for

options.name: --actual-value
options.description: The actual (ground truth) value

options.name: --source
options.description: Feedback source (e.g., 'user', 'system', 'manual')

commands.name: list
commands.description: List feedback entries for a model

options.name: --model
options.description: Model name

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of entries to show [default: 20]

options.name: --from
options.description: Start date filter (yyyy-MM-dd)

options.name: --to
options.description: End date filter (yyyy-MM-dd)

options.name: --json
options.description: Output in JSON format [default: False]

options.name: --model
options.description: Model name

options.name: --from
options.description: Start date filter (yyyy-MM-dd)

options.name: --to
options.description: End date filter (yyyy-MM-dd)

options.name: --json
options.description: Output in JSON format [default: False]

commands.name: sample
commands.description: Sample data from CSV files or prediction logs

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a sampled dataset from CSV file or prediction logs

options.name: --model
options.description: Model name to sample from (prediction log mode)

options.name: --from
options.description: CSV file to sample from (general-purpose mode)

options.name: --rows
options.description: Number of rows to sample [default: 1000]

options.name: --strategy
options.description: Sampling strategy: random, head, stratified (CSV) / recent, feedback-priority (logs) [default: random]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output CSV file path

options.name: --label
options.description: Label column for stratified sampling

commands.name: stats
commands.description: Show sampling statistics for a model

options.name: --model
options.description: Model name

options.name: --json
options.description: Output in JSON format [default: False]

commands.name: check
commands.description: Check if retraining should be triggered

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name to evaluate

options.name: --accuracy
options.description: Accuracy threshold (0.0-1.0). Triggers if accuracy drops below this value.

options.name: --feedback
options.description: Feedback volume threshold. Triggers if feedback count exceeds this value.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output in JSON format [default: False]

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name (required when comparing all experiments)

options.name: --best
options.description: Compare top N experiments by metric (default: all completed)

options.name: --metric
options.description: Sort by specific metric (default: best metric from training)

arguments.name: experiments
arguments.description: Experiment IDs to compare (e.g., exp-001 exp-002)

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name (default: 'default')

options.name: --force
options.description: Skip confirmation when replacing existing production model [default: False]

options.name: --no-backup
options.description: Skip backup of current production model before promotion [default: False]

options.name: --label
options.description: Label column name (overrides mloop.yaml setting)

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name to read label configuration from mloop.yaml [default: default]

options.name: --analyze
options.description: Run deep analysis: correlation, feature importance, distribution, anomaly detection [default: False]

options.name: --sample-size
options.description: Maximum rows to sample for deep analysis [default: 50000]

arguments.name: data-file
arguments.description: Path to data file to analyze

commands.name: evaluate
commands.description: Evaluate model performance on test data

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name (default: 'default')

arguments.name: experiment-id
arguments.description: Experiment ID to evaluate (defaults to production model if omitted)

arguments.name: test-data
arguments.description: Path to test data file (defaults to datasets/test.csv if omitted)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show detailed validation results [default: False]

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generate new project components (hooks, metrics, scripts)

options.name: --template
options.description: Template: basic (default), validation, logging, performance-gate, deploy

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Hook type: pre-train, post-train, pre-predict, post-evaluate

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show project status at a glance

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show detailed status information [default: False]

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Start REST API server for model serving

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to run the server on [default: 5000]

options.name: --host
options.description: Host address to bind to [default: localhost]

options.name: --detach
options.description: Run server in background [default: False]

commands.name: pipeline
commands.description: Execute ML workflow from YAML pipeline definition

options.name: --vars
options.description: Variables in JSON format to override pipeline variables

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Validate pipeline without executing [default: False]

options.name: --save-result
options.description: Save pipeline result to JSON file

options.name: --input
options.description: Input CSV file path (defaults to datasets/train.csv)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output CSV file path (defaults to <input>_prep.csv)

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name to use prep steps from (defaults to 'default')

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show pipeline steps without executing [default: False]

commands.name: docker
commands.description: Generate Docker configuration for model deployment

options.name: --name
options.description: Model name to containerize (defaults to 'default')

options.name: --port
options.description: Exposed port for API [default: 5000]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress interactive output [default: False]

commands.name: update
commands.description: Check for and install MLoop CLI updates

options.name: --check
options.description: Check for updates without installing [default: False]
